mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM u_user WHERE is_deleted = false) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_user_verification WHERE status = 0) AS pendingVerifications, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM u_user WHERE status = 2 AND is_deleted = false) AS bannedUsers, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task WHERE status = 0 AND is_deleted = false) AS openTasks, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task WHERE status IN (1, 2) AND is_deleted = false) AS inProgressTasks, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task WHERE status = 3 AND is_deleted = false) AS completedTasks, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order WHERE is_deleted = false) AS totalOrders, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order WHERE status = 2 AND is_deleted = false) AS completedOrders, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_report WHERE status = 0) AS pendingReports, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_report) AS totalReports, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_message WHERE is_read = false) AS unreadMessages, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_review) AS totalReviews, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(rating) FROM t_review), 0) AS averageRating
